title: Mr. 3 Mocks the Giants
description: On pages 8–11, mr. 3 mocks the giants as mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground.
scene: Mr. 3 Mocks the Giants. Mr. 3 separates Vivi from her protectors and turns Little Garden’s battlefield into a calculated execution ground. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Haha- haha!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Fuhaha- haha!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It must be nice to be such a simple dolt that cries from being too happy, mustn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Well... I guess I should be first saying, "Good work."

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You think these are tears of joy...!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Just what would you know...!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Who are you any- ways!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: I am Mr. 3... my apologies for only giving you my code- name... I'm a sculptor, you see.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: And this here is my assistant Miss Golden- Week, a realist painter.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Further- more,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: I must tell you that you have already been en- trapped by me...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: What is this...!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Alright, Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I may not know who was the one respon- Bible...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But I'll go and take care of him no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I'll go too!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Good! Please come along! It'll be quite reassuring!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There won't be any need for that...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: So it was you!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: We'll return this back to you! He was utterly useless to us...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Kyaha- Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Carue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How could you...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Carue has nothing to do with this!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Hey, who are these guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: They're the guys from the previous town!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: Indeed, that bird is the least of our concerns...!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 3 mocks the giants. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
